latestRoundData().notice: Returns round data with the set price as the answer.         Other fields are returned as mock data to simulate a         successful round.

setDecimals(uint8).notice: Sets the decimals returned in the answer

setPrice(int256).notice: Sets the answer that is returned by the Oracle when latestRoundData is called

documentation.text:
@dev The following is a mock Chainlink Price Feed Implementation.
      It is used purely for the purpose of testing & not to be used in production
@notice Sets the answer that is returned by the Oracle when latestRoundData is called
@notice Sets the decimals returned in the answer
